subcodes.title: Words spoken at House of the Master in Haifa, 1915-07-19
subcodes.first_line: Nay, there remaineth no obscurity, for the intention hath been made manifest. All those who were involved were well aware that Mirza Muhammad Ali opposed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خیر، هیچ مشتبه نمی شود، غرض بمیان میآید.  همه حضرات که راجع شده اند می دانستند که میرزا محمد علی مخالفت
